subject: Fermi GBM trigger 140708682 is not a GRB
submitter: Eric Burns at U of Alabama  <EricKayserBurns@gmail.com>
body:
E. Burns (UAH) report on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

���The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 140708682 at 16:22:21 UT
on 8 July 2014, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is due to a solar flare."
